name: p_5_1_a_smallest
nat_lang_statement: Write a method that returns the smallest of the arguments.

dafny.method_signature: p_5_1_a_smallest(x: real, y: real, z: real) returns (smallest: real)
ensures: smallest <= x && smallest <= y && smallest <= z
smallest == x || smallest == y || smallest == z

name: p_5_1_b_average
nat_lang_statement: Write a method that returns the average of the arguments.

dafny.method_signature: p_5_1_b_average(x: real, y: real, z: real) returns (average: real)

name: p_5_2_a_all_the_same
nat_lang_statement: Write a method returning true if the arguments are all the same.

dafny.method_signature: p_5_2_a_all_the_same(x: real, y: real, z: real) returns (all_same: bool)

name: p_5_2_b_all_different
nat_lang_statement: Write a method returning true if the arguments are all different.

dafny.method_signature: p_5_2_b_all_different(x: real, y: real, z: real) returns (all_diff: bool)
ensures: all_diff == (x != y && y != z && x != z)

name: p_5_2_c_sorted
nat_lang_statement: Write a method returning true if the arguments are sorted, with the smallest one coming first.

dafny.method_signature: p_5_2_c_sorted(x: real, y: real, z: real) returns (is_sorted: bool)

name: p_5_3_first_digit
nat_lang_statement: Write a method returning the first digit of the argument.

dafny.functional_code:
function intToSeq(n: int): seq<int>
  requires n >= 0
  ensures forall d :: d in intToSeq(n) ==> 0 <= d < 10
{
  if n < 10 then [n]
  else intToSeq(n / 10) + [n % 10]
}

name: p_5_4_middle
nat_lang_statement: Write a method that returns the middle character of a string if the length is odd, or the two middle characters if the length is even. For example, middle("middle") returns "dd".

ensures: if |str| % 2 == 1 then middle_str[0] == str[|str| / 2] else middle_str == str[|str| / 2 - 1 .. |str| / 2]

name: p_5_5_repeat
nat_lang_statement: Write a method that returns a string repeated n times. For example, repeat("ho", 3) returns "hohoho".

dafny.method_signature: p_5_5_repeat(str: string, n: int) returns (repeated_str: string)
ensures: forall i :: 0 <= i < n ==> repeated_str[i * |str| .. (i + 1) * |str| - 1 ] == str

name: p_5_6_count_vowels
nat_lang_statement: Write a method that returns the count of all vowels in a string. Vowels are the letters a, e, i, o, and u, and their uppercase variants.

name: p_5_7_count_words
nat_lang_statement: Write a method that returns the count of all words in a string. Words are separated by spaces. For example, countWords("Mary had a little lamb") should return 5.

name: p_5_8_scramble
nat_lang_statement: Write a method that constructs a scrambled version of string, randomly flipping two characters other than the first and last ones.

ensures: |word| >= 4 ==>  exists i, j :: 1 <= i < j <= |word| - 2 && word[i] == scrambled[j] && word[j] == scrambled[i] && forall k :: 0 <= k <= |word| -1 ==> (k != i && k != j ==> word[k] == scrambled[k])

name: p_5_9_a_sphere_volume
nat_lang_statement: Write a method that computes the volume of a sphere given its radius.

name: p_5_9_b_sphere_surface
nat_lang_statement: Write a method that computes the surface of a sphere given its radius.

name: p_5_9_c_cylinder_volume
nat_lang_statement: Write a method that computes the volume of a cylinder with a circular base, given radius and height.

dafny.method_signature: p_5_9_c_cylinder_volume(r: real, h: real) returns (volume: real)

name: p_5_9_d_cylinder_surface
nat_lang_statement: Write a method that computes the surface of a cylinder with a circular base, given radius and height.

dafny.method_signature: p_5_9_d_cylinder_surface(r: real, h: real) returns (surface: real)

name: p_5_9_e_cone_volume
nat_lang_statement: Write a method that computes the volume of a cone with a circular base, given radius and height.

dafny.method_signature: p_5_9_e_cone_volume(r: real, h: real) returns (volume: real)

name: p_5_9_f_cone_surface
nat_lang_statement: Write a method that computes the surface area of a cone with a circular base with a residual error less than 0.01, given radius and height.

dafny.method_signature: p_5_9_f_cone_surface(r: real, h: real) returns (surface: real)
